title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 01 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 01 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 01 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate ，and dropped in the afternoon. an decrease of 1.75% throughout the day; part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 885-900 yuan/mt; decreased 10-25 yuan/mt over yesterday.
